---
name: Release Debt Triage
about: Run a lightweight technical-debt triage as part of a release cycle
labels: documentation
---

<!--
Use this issue once per release to keep TECH_DEBT_TODO.md aligned
with real priorities and delivery progress.
-->

### Release Context

- Release tag / version:
- Release date:
- Facilitator:

### Triage Checklist

- [ ] Review each item in TECH_DEBT_TODO.md and confirm status accuracy.
- [ ] Re-prioritize remaining open items (P0/P1/P2) based on current risk.
- [ ] Close issues that are completed and update TODO status text.
- [ ] Split oversized debt items into smaller actionable issues.
- [ ] Archive or remove debt items that are no longer relevant.
- [ ] Update Suggested Implementation Order in TECH_DEBT_TODO.md.

### Outcomes

- Closed issues:
- Newly created follow-up issues:
- Priority changes made:
- TODO sections updated:

### Notes

Add any rationale, tradeoffs, and release-specific constraints that affected prioritization.
